标题: Introducing the new RDDBEX watch from the "NEW Factory" featuring a titanium flying tourbillon by Roger Dubuis. This watch showcases the brand's iconic design with a star-shaped frame, Celtic cross-shaped tourbillon, and a distinctive mechanical look. The case diameter is mm, thickness mm, powered by the latest V version movement with a fully skeletonized Seagull custom RDS manual winding movement. The watch features a titanium alloy case, precise six-position adjustment for the tourbillon movement, and a power reserve of up to hours. The dial is skeletonized with luminous markers, a black DLC-coated titanium sub-dial with minute track and Roger Dubuis logo. The hands are coated with luminous material for easy reading. The watch is equipped with anti-reflective sapphire crystal, and a German-imported natural rubber strap for comfort and vibrant color. Overall, this watch with its transparent skeleton movement, stability, and precision in timekeeping is a must-have for watch enthusiasts, exuding a gentlemanly charm. The "NEW Factory" continues to innovate and cater to watch lovers with passion and dedication.

Introducing the Roger Dubuis Carbon Fiber V Edition Tourbillon with a special feature - a hollow frame structure inside the movement! Watch enthusiasts know that the movement is the most crucial and core technology of a watch. To ensure that watch enthusiasts can experience a top-notch replica tourbillon, the new watchmakers at the NEW Factory have experimented tirelessly to overcome all existing technical barriers. The double-layered hollow frame structure of the movement achieves both stability and precision, making the V Edition movement even more perfect and identical to the authentic RDSQ structure. The watch case has been upgraded with carbon fiber, a high-tech material that is half the weight of aluminum but three times as strong. The V Edition carbon fiber case features clearer and more exquisite patterns, providing a lightweight and comfortable wearing experience with a cool dark pattern texture. The natural rubber strap perfectly fits the wrist, offering the highest level of comfort. The watch buckle is made of titanium metal with advanced black vacuum plating, ensuring durability and color retention. Every detail is meticulously developed by the NEW Factory, showing their dedication to watch enthusiasts. The NEW Factory achieves a new breakthrough, treating watch enthusiasts with "heart"!

Introducing the new "NEW Factory" and the latest Roger Dubuis "Super Tourbillon Watch". Based on the brand's relentless pursuit of rebellious luxury and exquisite craftsmanship, this Excalibur King series flying tourbillon watch embodies the brand's new watchmaking concept. Roger Dubuis' ultimate version of the Mingling series has arrived. Limited to 200 sets, the upgraded features include the debut of the CCt simplified movement, with the hands now compressed to a hair's breadth for precision. The CCt movement is groundbreaking and allows for the addition of zirconium diamond hands. This limited edition set will not be reproduced due to high production costs. The Velvet series ladies' watch features a distinct dial design with a unique aesthetic. The dial is embellished with top-quality gemstones, creating a dazzling effect. The watch case is crafted from polished stainless steel, maintaining the brand's classic look. The crown is also made of stainless steel with a screw-in design for water resistance. The dial and hands are meticulously crafted to replicate the original, with handcrafted hour markers and a three-dimensional effect.

Roger Dubuis has released the ultimate version of the Mingling series with the ultimate movement. The first batch of 200 sets is now available, featuring a simplified CCt movement that allows for the addition of zirconium diamond pointers. This innovative creation is a breakthrough in watchmaking. The Velvet series ladies' watch from Roger Dubuis features a distinct and stylish dial design with a unique three-dimensional effect. The watch is meticulously crafted with top-quality materials and exquisite gemstone inlays, showcasing exceptional craftsmanship. The upgraded details include a polished stainless steel case, a refined crown design for water resistance, and handcrafted hour markers for a luxurious look.

The "NEW Factory" returns with the only titanium case. Model: RDDBEX watch. This watch features the iconic design of Roger Dubuis, with a star-shaped frame design, a Celtic cross-shaped tourbillon, a small seconds sub-dial, and a mechanical feel that is instantly recognizable. The case diameter is mm, thickness mm, equipped with a Seagull custom RDSQ manual winding movement, meticulously finished with various outstanding details including the main plate and fish scale pattern polishing. The titanium alloy case is synchronized with the original. The integrated tourbillon movement is finely tuned in six directions. Power reserve up to hours. Each movement has a unique number. The hollow dial features luminescent markers, a black DLC-coated titanium sub-dial with black minute track and Roger Dubuis logo. Luminous hands for easy time reading. Sapphire crystal with anti-glare coating (same as original). German-imported natural rubber strap for high comfort and vibrant color. In summary, the transparent skeleton movement on both sides enhances the watch's aesthetics. With the Seagull custom RDSQ manual winding movement, precise and stable timekeeping, this titanium skeleton tourbillon watch from NEW Roger Dubuis exudes gentlemanly charm and is a must-have for watch enthusiasts. "NEW Factory" achieves a new breakthrough, treating watch enthusiasts with "heart"!

The hollow frame structure inside the movement is well-known among watch enthusiasts as the most crucial and core technology of a timepiece. In order to provide watch lovers with a top-notch replica tourbillon, the new watchmakers have experimented tirelessly to overcome all existing technical barriers. Every meticulous detail reflects the sincerity of the craftsmanship by NEW Factory. Notable features include: - Case: Titanium alloy case synchronized with the original. - Movement: Integrated tourbillon movement calibrated in six positions. Power reserve up to hours, each movement has a unique serial number. - Dial: Hollow dial with luminous markers, black DLC-coated titanium seconds sub-dial with minute track and Roger Dubuis logo. Luminous-coated hands for easy time reading. - Crystal: Sapphire crystal with anti-glare coating (same as original). - Strap: German-imported natural rubber strap, high softness and comfort, vibrant color. In summary, the transparent tourbillon movement on both the front and back of the watch enhances its visual appeal. Equipped with the Seagull custom RDSQ manual winding movement, it offers stable and precise timekeeping, making it a must-have for watch enthusiasts. "NEW Factory" achieves new breakthroughs, catering to watch enthusiasts with passion and dedication!

Roger Dubuis has released the ultimate version of the famous series with the ultimate movement. The first batch of 200 sets is now available, featuring a simplified CCt movement that allows for the use of zirconium diamond pointers. This innovative creation is truly unique and groundbreaking. The limited edition diamond pointer set is a rare find due to the complexity of its development. The Velvet series ladies' watch from Roger Dubuis features a distinct and stylish dial design with a three-dimensional relief effect. The watch is meticulously crafted with top-quality materials and exquisite gemstone inlays, showcasing exceptional craftsmanship and design. The watch case is made of polished stainless steel, maintaining the brand's classic appearance. The dial and hands are meticulously crafted to replicate the authentic look, with handcrafted hour markers and a polished finish. The watch crown is also made of stainless steel with a screw-in design for water resistance. The watch is meticulously detailed to ensure a high-quality finish and water resistance. The dial and hands are designed to replicate the authentic model, with precise markings and a three-dimensional effect. The watch features handcrafted hour markers for a luxurious touch.

Roger Dubuis upgraded version now available at the same price. The Velvett Diva series ladies' watch features a distinctive and stylish dial design with a three-dimensional relief effect created through two different layers. The numbers and blocks are positioned at the center of the dial, the lugs are carefully decorated, and the case shape is a unique blend of round and barrel shapes, providing a visually stunning aesthetic. This watch reinterprets the brand's aesthetic elements with exquisite craftsmanship and romantic poetic beauty. The dial is mm, with a sapphire crystal, and has been modified with top-grade natural gemstones for a dazzling and highly challenging craftsmanship. The watch showcases exquisite gem-setting techniques, outstanding design, and the perfect fusion of jewelry. The new model features the brand's exclusive gorgeous diamonds, with upgraded details as follows: 【Case】 The case retains the brand's classic rounded appearance, made of stainless steel, polished to enhance its exquisite and luxurious design style, sturdy and durable material. The flat parts are polished, the sides are sandblasted, and the bezel has vertical satin finish for both color vibrancy and wear resistance. The smooth lines fit the wrist better. The crown is also made of stainless steel, screw-in design for water resistance, anti-slip texture for precise time adjustment, and 100% waterproof testing for each watch. Even the smallest corners are chamfered for comfort. The dial and hands have a distinct layered look consistent with the authentic model. The dial markers are handcrafted in three dimensions to match the authentic model.
